groups.description: Specifies the IAM groups to attach the policy to; must be a list of existing group names.

name.description: Specifies the name of the IAM policy attachment; must be unique within the AWS account.

policy_arn.description: ARN of the IAM policy to attach to the specified roles, users, or groups; must be a valid AWS policy ARN.

roles.description: List of IAM roles to attach the policy to; must be specified as an array of role names.

users.description: Specifies the list of IAM users to attach the policy to; must include valid user names.
